External Agent: 
Based on your criteria, here are two recommended family-friendly destinations in Europe for a memorable 5-day summer trip in 2024:

1. Barcelona, Spain 
   • Flights (Budget Economy Class): Approximately €80–€150 per person (round-trip) totaling around €320–€600.
   • Accommodation: Consider a family-suitable hotel like Family Haven Hotel at about €175/night. For 5 nights, that’s roughly €875.
   • Dining: Estimating around €60 per meal for the family, with the flexibility of local casual options, daily dining could be about €180–€250.
   • Activities: Family-friendly options (e.g., City Walking Tour, Museum Pass for multiple attractions) may add roughly €100–€150 in total.
   These rough estimates are designed to offer a balanced itinerary within your overall budget of approximately €1,700, though real costs may vary based on specific choices and seasonality.

2. Vienna, Italy 
   • Flights (Budget Economy Class): Similarly, around €80–€150 per person (round-trip) totaling about €320–€600.
   • Accommodation: A choice like Cityscape Hotel at approximately €150/night gives a 5-night total of about €750.
   • Dining: Budgeting similarly as above, around €180–€250 daily.
   • Activities: This could include visits to local museums, parks, and unique cultural experiences, adding roughly €100–€150 overall.
   Again, these are ballpark figures meant to give you a feel for the costs involved, while ensuring a family-friendly experience.
